title: 06 Days Omo Valley Tours
html:
Day 1: Addis Ababa

Visit Trinity Cathedral, resting place of Emperor Haile Selassie. Tour the Museum, a great introduction to ethiopian culture and history. Make a short drive to Entoto hills for a view of the city and visit Maryam church. En-route, stop at Sheromeda Traditional cloth market. Visit the mercato or the sholla market, two of addis ababa’s main markets.
Overnight: hotel

Day 2: Fly From Addis To Jinka

The driver waiting you at the airport then drive to Jinka for lunch after lunche Turmi  on the way we stop to sea Dimeka market and Hammar village. The Hammar people who are the beautiful tribe in omo valley the tribe principally pastoralist breeding cattle goat and sheep. They have a similar veneration for cattle as their close neighbors. Who is using clay to make a shape their hairstyles. within two nights in Turmi you have  a chance to visit  the unique practice of “bull-jumping” every young man must accomplish prior to marriage and to become a man. Overnight: Turmi

Day 3: Turmi – Dassanech – Turmi

In the morning after breakfast we  drive to omorate village to visit the Dassanech tribe.You will be led towards a village which is located in a remote area of the omo valley by the bank of omo river noticing the very hot weather in this area you will  understand the lifestyle of the Dassenech.The Dassenech have adapted themselves to nature and the different weather conditions at the right time of the year they will go out hunting for crocodiles which are easy to find in this area.After taking enough time with the Dasenech tribe we will reach back to Turmi. Overnight: Turmi

Day 4 : Turmi – Karo – Jinka

In the morning after breakfast we will drive to Kara tribe lives from the omo River.They are closely related to Hammer tribe, but do have their own culture and language.They are famous for their body painting . After Kara tribe we will drive back to Turmi for having lunch then we will keep drive to Jinka on the way we stop to visit different villages Benna and the Keyafar market  is the best colorful market in omo valley the drive to jinka.
Overnight: Jinka

Day 5: Jinka – jinka – Mursi

In the  morning after breakfast  will peak you from the hotel and we will drive mursi Village though Mago national Park. The Mursi women wear circular clay plate on their lower lip as well ear lobes the men are known for the  stick fighting bake to jinka.
Overnight: jinka

Day 6: Jinka – Addis Abeba

Morning drive   to Ari villages you will visit to the nearby village and  museum  visit after bake to Addis Abeba. Overnight:  hotel
